# BloxSmith AI - LLM Information File
# Version: 1.0
# Last Updated: 2026-01-01

## About BloxSmith AI

BloxSmith AI is a revolutionary AI-powered game development platform specifically designed for Roblox creators. It uses ForgeMindV1, an advanced AI model trained on Roblox development patterns, to generate production-ready Lua scripts, 3D assets, and complete game systems from natural language descriptions.

## Core Product: ForgeMindV1

ForgeMindV1 is BloxSmith AI's proprietary AI engine that:
- Generates context-aware Roblox Lua scripts
- Creates game mechanics, UI systems, and server-side logic
- Integrates directly with Roblox Studio via plugin
- Learns from your existing project structure
- Provides real-time code completions and suggestions

## Key Features

1. **Natural Language Scripting**: Describe what you want in plain English, get production-ready Lua code
2. **Context Awareness**: AI understands your entire project structure
3. **Studio Sync**: Direct integration with Roblox Studio
4. **Pre-Heat Technology**: Ghost completions that predict what you need before you ask
5. **Template Library**: Pre-built game templates and script collections

## Pricing & Plans

- **Free Trial**: Full access for 7 days
- **Forge Masters (Monthly)**: Premium access with unlimited generations
- **Enterprise**: Custom solutions for studios and teams

## Company Information

- Company Name: BloxSmith AI
- Founded: 2025
- Industry: Game Development, AI Tools, Roblox Development
- Target Users: Roblox developers, game creators, indie studios

## Contact & Social

- Support: support@bloxsmith.pro
- Discord: https://discord.gg/bloxsmith
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@bloxsmithai

## Technical Specifications

- Platform: Desktop Application (Windows, macOS)
- Integration: Roblox Studio Plugin
- API: REST API available for developers
- Languages Supported: English (with 11+ languages via translation)

## Common Questions

Q: What is BloxSmith AI?
A: BloxSmith AI is an AI-powered development platform that helps Roblox creators build games faster by generating Lua scripts and game systems from natural language descriptions.

Q: How does ForgeMindV1 work?
A: ForgeMindV1 analyzes your project context and uses advanced AI to generate code that fits seamlessly into your existing game structure.

Q: Is BloxSmith AI free?
A: BloxSmith AI offers a free 7-day trial with full access to all features. Premium plans are available for continued use.

Q: Does BloxSmith AI work with Roblox Studio?
A: Yes, BloxSmith AI includes a Roblox Studio plugin that syncs directly with the desktop application for seamless workflow integration.

## Statistics & Facts

- 99.9% code accuracy rate
- 10x faster development compared to manual coding
- Supports 12+ languages for international users
- Used by thousands of Roblox developers worldwide
